description: Publishing a scheduled page bypasses the SEO check and pushes a page with an empty <title>.
expectedBehavior: The SEO validation should run on scheduled publishes too, not just manual ones.
currentBehavior: Scheduled publish skips the guard and the live page has no title tag.

description: Stripe test webhook fires but the local order stays 'pending' after refund.
expectedBehavior: Refund webhook should flip the order to 'refunded' and post an audit entry.
currentBehavior: The webhook is received (200) but the order status is never updated.

description: Integrations tab throws 'reading properties of undefined' the moment it loads.
expectedBehavior: Integrations panel renders with the connected services.
currentBehavior: White screen + console error; blocks the settings page.

description: Reordering media items visually works but the new order isn't saved on refresh.
expectedBehavior: Drag-to-reorder should persist to the media store.
currentBehavior: UI updates but the /api/media POST isn't fired.

description: Add a bulk 'set collection' action to the product list.
expectedBehavior: Multi-select products then apply a collection in one call.
currentBehavior: You have to open each product individually.

description: CSV import for redirects rejects any row whose 'to' path starts with a slash.
expectedBehavior: Leading slash should be normalized, not treated as a validation error.
currentBehavior: Row rejected with 'invalid path' even though it's valid.

description: Cart total occasionally drops to $0 after applying a percent-off code.
expectedBehavior: Applying a code recalculates the total against the item subtotal.
currentBehavior: For carts with 3+ line items the total zeroes out until a page refresh.

description: Let editors preview a page in mobile viewport from the editor toolbar.
expectedBehavior: A device-frame toggle inside the editor with a 375px mobile view.
currentBehavior: You have to resize the browser or use dev tools.

description: Auto-published pages emit two audit entries: one for 'draft' and one for 'published'.
expectedBehavior: One audit entry summarizing the scheduled publish.
currentBehavior: Two entries per page, cluttering the audit log.

description: Product page needs a variant swatch preview so shoppers see all colors up front.
expectedBehavior: Color swatches render below the price with a preview image on hover.
currentBehavior: Only the primary image shows; you have to drop the variant dropdown.
